title: Ministerial Instructions Amending the Ministerial Instructions Respecting the Express Entry System, 2020-1 - Canada.ca
content:
## Ministerial Instructions Amending the Ministerial Instructions Respecting the Express Entry System, 2020-1
Note: These amendments to the ministerial instructions come into force on August 31, 2020.
The Minister of Citizenship and Immigration, pursuant to paragraph 10.3(1)(k) Footnote a of the Immigration Protection Act Footnote b , gives the annexed Ministerial Instruction Amending the Ministerial Instructions Respecting the Express Entry System, 2020-1 .
Ottawa, August 31,2020 Marco E. L. Mendicino Minister of Citizenship and Immigration

## Amendment Modification

### 1 Section 6 of the Ministerial Instructions Respecting the Express Entry System Footnote 1 is replaced by the following:

#### Validity period Invitation
(6) An invitation is valid for the period of time beginning on the day after it is issued by the Minister and ending on the 90th day after that day, and any application for a permanent resident visa in response to that invitation must be made within that period.

### 2 This Instruction takes effect on the date on which it is given.
